reference: I have pain in my left arm. I am a twenty-three-year-old healthy man. I worked out three days ago, including lifting weights. A day after, I noticed my left arm hurting and I am unable to extend my arm straight out. When I try to straighten my arm, a sharp pain shoots all the way to my fingertips. Do you have any idea what I did and if it will go away soon?
text: I have pain in my left arm. I am a 23-year-old healthy man. I worked out three days ago, including lifting weights. The day after, I noticed my left arm hurting, and I am unable to extend my arm straight out. When I try to straighten my arm, sharp pain shoots all the way to my thumb. Do you have any idea what I did, and if it will go away?
